specific_question: From January 2024 to September 2024,  what was MediConn's policy on recording customer service calls?
answer: From January 2024 to September 2024, all MediConn service calls were recorded with patient consent for quality assurance and training purposes and stored securely for 90 days in compliance with PIPEDA.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
